roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL FOR EXECUTION OF THE 2 YEAR STATE PRISON SENTENCE//X:DEFENDANT IS USING THE NAME OF OTHEADOS TASWELL,//X:THE COURT ORDERS EXECUTION OF THE 2 YEAR STATE PRISON SENTENCE AND, AFTERHEARING ARGUMENT, FINDS THAT DEFENDANT'S JAN 7,2000 WAIVER OF ALL PAST CREDITS WAS FOR ALL TIME AND ALL PURPOSES, THE COURT FINDS THAT CTS NOW DUE AGAINST THE 2 YEAR SENTENCE IS 248DAYS WITH 124DAYS SAGE, WHICH TOTALS 372DAYS,/AJW/CH1:SP2Y:M/CTSP:248/X:DEFENDANT TO PAY $200 RESTITUTION FINE PER 1202,45PC WHICH IS SUSPENDED UNLESS PAROLE IS REVOKED,/DEFTSENT/PAR/CDC/TEXT/5A/5B/PRBSTAT/PB/

/CAL FOR HEARING ON DA MTR//X:SWORN & EXAMINED WERE PEOPLE'S WITNESS SCOTT LAU AND DEFENSE WITNESS ,DEFENDANT, ANTJUAN GAY USING THE NAME OTHEADOS TASWELL,/X:PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT#1IS ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE,/ARG&SUB//X:THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT IN VIOLATION OF PROBATION, REVOKES PROBATION AND ORDERS EXECUTION OF THE 2 YEAR STATE PRISON SENTENCE, BUT STAYS THE ORDER OF EXECUTION UNTIL 04-20-01 FOR DETERMINATION OF APPROPRIATE CTS,/X:EXHIBITS ARE RETURNED TO THE PEOPLE,/CONTD IN DEPT#25 TO 04-20-01 TO ORDER EXECUTION OF SENTENCE,/
/CAL TO SET DA MTR/X:DEFENDANT SAYS HIS TRUE NAME IS OTHEADOS TASWELL,//CONTD IN DEPT#25 04-13-01 FOR HEARING ON DA MTR/
CONTD TS PROB REV HRG DA/
DEFT NO LONGER REQ'D SERVE HOME DETENT;CJ67D;CTS67D;90DSWAP
CONTD TS WHET PROB SHD REM REV APD
TRANSF'D D21 JUDGE DONDERO &CONT 11/30/98 830AM FOR MTR/APD
/AJW/CH1 SP 2Y M ESS PROB 3 Y PJ 6M /CTS  54 /STATES/HD/WS/VF4 $200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/TRANS:LAS VEGAS/PROB EXT:06-05-2001/ACCEP/
CONTD TS PROB REV HRG DA/
CONTD TS PROB REV HRG DA/
CONTD TS PROB REV HRG DA/SUPP:10-01-98/S21/PROB ADM REV/SHER/
CERT TO SUP CT, SEE DOCKET FOR PROPOSED SENT
DEF FTA, BWI, B/S $5,000, OR REVKD
